items.summary: Update the Google Maps iframe src attribute to use the exact coordinates from the Google Maps link https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5 to ensure the embedded map displays the precise location of Ghuge Medicals

Create a new section below the existing contact information and map that displays detailed business information from the Google Maps listing for Ghuge Medicals at https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5, including any available descriptions, business category, and location details presented in a visually organized card format
